calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Schindler for Petitioner.

Mr. Schindler addressed the issue regarding valid restraint on transfer, stated that the Trust was drafted to protect the Daughter and the Son that was born at the time the will was drafted, that the Daughter lived out of the Country at that time and now she's back. The Court tentativley granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION Petition For Order Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Aug-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
